title: I dont want to speak to you anymore.
content:
I dont want to speak to you anymore.

I’d appreciate it if you gave me the money back from the engagement ring since we are not engaged and you’re incapable of being a fiance.

It would be so much easier if you gave me the money back, otherwise i’ll figure out what to do on my own.

Bottom line, I’m not interested in being with you, you’re not the right person for me, you’re very immature. Im moving forward in a positive way with my life and you are still in the same chaotic place as when i met you.
context: From document: I dont want to speak to you anymore.
